a7f7bec1-5ff1-4cd6-adce-70744b2fc7d1.title: Gerald
a7f7bec1-5ff1-4cd6-adce-70744b2fc7d1.text:
Good day to you traveller, are you here to fish or just
looking around? I've caught some beauties down here.

19b3190f-4206-4f9f-8d04-fa3c6307a350.title: Gerald
19b3190f-4206-4f9f-8d04-fa3c6307a350.text: The last one was this big!

e566efdf-6b24-4c27-a2c8-303486fa444d.title: <player>
e566efdf-6b24-4c27-a2c8-303486fa444d.text: Have you seen a small boy?

fa3c1d80-ee75-4938-a0f5-f817054c4a18.title: Gerald
fa3c1d80-ee75-4938-a0f5-f817054c4a18.text: Nope, plenty of small fish though.

95ca8655-7ad7-4403-a5f4-64fd904176da.title: Gerald
95ca8655-7ad7-4403-a5f4-64fd904176da.text:
Hello traveller. Are you here to fish or to hunt for
treasure?

bce14efe-d361-4079-8aeb-f20b976922c9.title: Gerald
bce14efe-d361-4079-8aeb-f20b976922c9.text:
Adventurers pass through here every week, they never
find anything though.

4acfdbc6-2a77-4240-b9ab-4a8b839f6834.title: <player>
4acfdbc6-2a77-4240-b9ab-4a8b839f6834.text: What treasure are they looking for?

9149c819-1cf8-4221-8d08-a334d5dd4872.title: Gerald
9149c819-1cf8-4221-8d08-a334d5dd4872.text:
They say there's treasure hidden within the waterfall,
left behind by the old elven king. Not that anyone's
ever found anything.

371eeca5-75bb-4c47-8ce6-b7f38e7e07bd.title: <player>
371eeca5-75bb-4c47-8ce6-b7f38e7e07bd.text:
Interesting, is there somewhere I can learn more about
this?

2ff281da-0e21-4ff2-aeac-7411770f7ea9.title: Gerald
2ff281da-0e21-4ff2-aeac-7411770f7ea9.text:
You could ask Hadley the tourist guide. He'll be in this
building just here.

bfdf3a7e-2b39-4f0d-bf95-abb2b77ef155.title: Note
bfdf3a7e-2b39-4f0d-bf95-abb2b77ef155.text: updates questlog to go to the Tourist Centre

be60413b-fd86-4561-a86c-1f0b8bb13b89.title: Gerald
be60413b-fd86-4561-a86c-1f0b8bb13b89.text:
Hello traveller. Are you here to fish or to hunt for
treasure?

338a94c2-f353-4f00-923c-3ce87152d553.title: Gerald
338a94c2-f353-4f00-923c-3ce87152d553.text:
Adventurers pass through here every week, they never
find anything though.
